transcript: The Japan capitalise here, side netting only, tight angle for Junya Ito, Williams, Aspilicueta, in goes Morata, Alvaro Morata, goal there from Serge Gnabry, it's good enough for Germany at the moment but it comes a bad what an impact off the substitutes bench for Ritsu Doan and here they come again Japan into the danger area oh it's in, remarkable, Japan's celebrations quickly brought to a halt Tanaka was wheeling away, believing he'd put his side 2-1 up it did look like it was out Asensio difficult for Gonda, great challenge from Yoshida the captain Rodri Dani Olmo under the return We'll be right back. challenge from Yoshida, the captain, Rodri, Dani Olmo under the return, Gonder pouches it, Japan win Gruby, Spain progress as runners-up.
